markdown:
#  Can I change the language that Procore scans my drawings for? 
##  Background 
When you upload new drawings to a project, Procore uses [Optical Character Recognition (OCR)](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Optical%5Fcharacter%5Frecognition) technology to scan them and automatically populate certain information. See [Which fields can Procore automatically populate when uploading drawings?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-fields-can-procore-automatically-populate-when-uploading-drawings) If you are uploading drawings that are in a different language than your project is set to, you can change the language that Procore will scan for.
##  Answer 
You can choose between four different languages for drawings uploads: English, French, German, and Spanish. The language associated with your company or project's locale is selected by default, but you can select another language from the list if needed. The 'Drawing Language' drop-down menu is located under Advanced Options when uploading drawings. See [Upload Drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/user-guide-bidding-and-estimating-integration/upload-drawings).

  * [What are the different fields in the Document Management tool?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-the-different-fields-in-the-document-management-tool)
title: Can I change the language that Procore scans my drawings for?
